text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 11 

MDCD_CHIP_NON_ABD_MOS 

LABEL: MDCD or CHIP Enrollment — Non-ABD Months 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of months during the year that the beneficiary was enrolled in Medicaid or 
CHIP but was not eligible for Medicaid benefits due to aged, blind or disabled (A/B/D) categories. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS DE file (derived) 

VALUES: 0–12 or null/missing (if not Medicaid or CHIP enrolled during the
